articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
articles.title: Ubuntu services hit by outages after DDoS attack - TechCrunch
articles.description: A group of hacktivists have claimed responsibility for a distributed denial-of-service attack, which has affected several Ubuntu and Canonical websites, and prevented users from updating the Linux-based operating system.
articles.content: Hacktivists have claimed responsibility for taking down the public-facing infrastructure of popular Linux operating system distribution Ubuntu, as well as Canonical, the company that develops and mai… [+2142 chars]

articles.author: Andrew Cunningham
articles.title: Apple may take "several months" to catch up to Mac mini and Studio demand - Ars Technica
articles.description: Chip shortages and demand from AI enthusiasts are both playing a part.
